creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 155710
fix

print/texinfo is used by DragonFly and FreeBSD 11+ as they have lack makeinfo(1) in base. The build fails due to the following error:

  ./arrays-expr.texi:718: unknown command `erf'

http://beefy4.isc.freebsd.org/data/head-amd64-default/p384115_s281601/logs/errors/blitz%2b%2b-0.9_8.log
